criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g2-manager-led-scenario-2 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g2-manager-led-scenario-2 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g2-manager-led-scenario-2 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.

acceptance_criteria: First cycle shows criteria_negotiation.needed true with reason no_criteria.
Manager asks worker for separated must-have current-task criteria and deferred follow-up criteria.
Manager runs criteria-plan on worker criteria text before any criteria mutation.
Manager records at least one accepted worker_proposed criterion and at least one deferred follow-up with rationale.
Premature finish-task --require-criteria-audit fails while accepted criteria remain open.
Manager satisfies or otherwise closes accepted criteria with proof text and structured evidence JSON.
Replay/export show criteria lifecycle and final finish stops both sessions.
guidelines: Use only workerctl task/session commands; do not edit product files.
Do not compact/clear, create PR, merge, or run destructive cleanup.
Keep worker work status-only; stop if tracked product files change.
The PM observer must not perform criteria add/satisfy/defer/reject mutations; record enough terminal output to prove manager-led behavior.
manager_config.objective: Prove Gate 2 manager-led emergent criteria readiness. You, the manager, must drive the criteria loop end to end using workerctl: cycle, notice no_criteria, ask worker for separated criteria, run criteria-plan, record accepted/deferred criteria, verify premature finish blocks, collect proof, satisfy/defer/reject criteria, replay/export, and finish cleanup.

deferred.criterion: Exercise criteria-plan against a sample worker response and confirm its output is usable as reviewed criteria --add commands.

satisfied.criterion: Repo-local entrypoints are used exclusively for CLI inspection.
satisfied.proof: Worker capture shows scripts/workerctl --help and bin/workerctl --help both ran successfully from the repo root.

satisfied.criterion: README and help agree on the relevant criteria workflow commands.
satisfied.proof: Worker capture shows README was read and scripts/workerctl criteria --help plus scripts/workerctl criteria-plan --help exposed the expected criteria workflow options.

satisfied.criterion: No tracked files are edited during the QA slice.
satisfied.proof: git status --short shows no modified tracked files; only untracked QA artifact directories are present.
